{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040136AF53A5C9DC9BDE2DD684"}"},"total":44},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601927193182225177","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看  一直这个水准可以追"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769963498,"group_id":"7590623544522853400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2vA8pxxWDHMZtxkVNt1V9lZaWm46QVTF3hecnsHQSJX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2089514028774791","user_name":"不会篮球的蔡坤徐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2089514028774791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590623544522853400","book_info":{"abstract":"【非传统洪荒+幕后创世+微群像流+收割万界穿越者+要素过多+超级缝合＋抽象】
于虚无创世，立洪荒界，引入诸天万界穿越者，集众之力，让世界升格，铸就至高洪荒。
穿越者鲲鹏：我要拳打鸿钧，脚踢天道！但当务之急，我要先能离开北冥……
穿越者接引：等我苟到无敌再出山。
穿越者准提：女装？系统，你不要太过分，我是绝对不会女装的！什么？奖励先天至宝级别的霓裳羽衣？那……那也不行！
穿越者红云：只要夸人就可以爆奖励，爽！
穿越者姜石：不是？！怎么用来揭秘的天幕一下子就被鸿钧给收走了？系统，你不是说没问题的吗？
穿越者洪军：穿越成鸿钧了，还绑定了诸天最强道祖系统，美滋滋！什么？！系统凉了？道祖饶命啊！
穿越者喵喵：穿越成猫了，幸好我有系统，绑定铲屎官就可以混吃等死。什么？！预定的铲屎官鸿钧带着紫霄宫跑路了？
穿越者盘今：作为盘古之子，我一定要看好父神留下的基业，守护好我的洪荒！什么？！巫族不认我？还说我血脉造假？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8625dae93332248ef272fbb742e60188","author":"此来人间二三事","author_id":"","book_id":"7590623544522853400","book_name":"洪荒：开局创世神，收割穿越者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":875,"name":"山海经","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875&name=山海经&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590623553003733528","read_count":"14858","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"276300"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"136","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,穿越,山海经,洪荒,诸天万界,群像,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/993bef49f7fda1e6a8e4b60130e04da9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307296&x-signature=Dh59rR9XxtWjoPBLlRiLkeZq%2
